title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at Naukri

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at Naukri
jsonLd.description:
Join the Naukri family as a Software Engineer in Thane. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Naukri:
Naukri is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in TypeScript

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Naukri!
jsonLd.skills: Git, REST APIs, Go, SQL, Kubernetes, MongoDB, JavaScript, TypeScript
